question: Why didn't I receive a prepaid return label? Do you provide return shipping labels?
intents: why didnt i get return label
do i get return shipping label
answer: Thank you for your response and explanation of your situation. Unfortunately, we do not provide return shipping labels. We can assist with reimbursing you up to \$12.00 to send any items back to us. We usually recommend shipping items back via your local post office. They have flat rate envelopes that run between \$4-7 and provide you with tracking and insurance. When you mail them to us have the clerk include a copy of the shipping receipt in the package and once, they arrive we can refund you back to the original form of payment. I hope this information is helpful, but please let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.

Return/Exchange Policy: https://www.rainbowsandals.com/customer-service/return-exchange

question: My sandals are damaged. Are they covered under warranty?
answer: Thank you for reaching out to us, and for your support of our brand. I am sorry to hear about any trouble you are experiencing with your sandals. That sounds like something we might be able to assist with. If possible, can you please email us a top-down picture of the tops and bottoms of your sandals (left and right side by side)? That will help us determine if this is something our warranty will cover. We need to be able to see the entire tops and bottoms of both sandals so please keep that in mind when you are taking the photos. Once we get your pictures we can respond directly with all available options. Please let us know if you do have any other questions or concerns.

question: My sandals broke again after being repaired. What can you do?
answer: Thank you for your response, I apologize for the repair job that was not completed properly for you. For this situation where it is the second time an item is breaking after being repaired, we will fully replace the sandals for you with a brand-new pair. When you mail the sandals into us include a note/copy of this email explaining the situation. Once they arrive, we can assist further with fully replacing them and shipping them out to you at no additional charge. When you mail these sandals back to us, have the clerk include a copy of the return shipping receipt and we can reimburse you up to \$12.00 this time for the return shipping costs. I apologize for any trouble this situation may have caused, but I look forward to assisting with resolving this matter for you. Please let me know if you have any other questions or concerns.

question: Can you check the status of my order?
answer: Thank you for reaching out to us, and for your order. I may be able to assist with finding your order information and providing an update. If possible, can you please reply with the Order Number, or the full Billing Name and Address you entered when you placed your order. From there I should be able to find the order and provide a full update on the status. I look forward to your response, but please let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.

question: My sandals stained my feet—is this covered under warranty?
intents: My sandals left stains on my feet. Is this something the warranty covers?
The sandals I bought are staining my feet—can I claim this under the warranty?
these sandals are leaving marks on my feet. Is that covered by the warranty?
My sandals are causing stains on my feet. Can I get a warranty replacement or refund?
answer: Thank you for your photos and explanation. What you are experiencing is not something that is covered under our warranty. When leather gets wet it will stiffen as it dries, it can crack, bleed, stain, shrink, or do nothing. Leather is unpredictable and it doesn’t necessarily do the same thing twice. Water is not good for leather and while I do realize that the sandals were not being used with the intent to get them wet, this did happen because of use and is therefore not covered. After they are totally dry and have been worn a few times dry the bleeding should slow down and eventually stop but no guarantee. I apologize we cannot be of further assistance.

question: Do you sell gift cards online?
answer: Thank you for reaching out to us, and for your interest in our brand. Unfortunately, we only offer Gift Certificates in our San Clemente, CA Outlet Location. The Gift certificates we offer currently only work in our San Clemente, CA Outlet Location. We do not have any active plans to instate Gift Certificates that will work on our Website Store. I hope this information is helpful, but please let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.

question: Can I buy just one sandal?
answer: Unfortunately we cannot sell single sandals because it would create inventory issues within our system. Some customers have had success buying or selling single sandals through marketplaces such as eBay.I hope this info helps.

question: My package is marked delivered but I didn’t receive it. What should I do?

order says delivered but i dont have it
usps says delivered but not here

My shipment shows delivered, but I didn’t receive the package. What are the next steps?

answer: Thank you for your response and explanation of the situation. Once we hear back from them, we will contact you directly to let you know the options available to get your sandals to you as soon as possible. I hope this information is helpful, but please let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.

question: Can you replace worn-out soles?
intents: Do you offer sole replacement for worn shoes?
Is it possible to get the soles of my shoes replaced?
Can I have the soles of my shoes changed if they’re worn out?
Do you provide a service to replace old or damaged soles?
answer: Thank you for those photos. Worn soles are not covered under our warranty. We can replace these soles at a price for you though. It’s a highly labor-intensive process and the cost is \$20.00 per sandal, or \$40.00 for the pair. This covers installation of a new soles, sanding around the edges of both sandals, and shipping back to your home. If you are interested, please mail both sandals into us at the address below in my signature and include a check, money order, credit card number, or cash as well as a note indicating you would like to use the pay for resoling repair service. Thank you.

answer: Dog chew damage is not covered under warranty, but we can replace the strap for \$20 per strap. This includes installing the new strap, sanding the edges, and shipping the sandals back to you.

what can i do dog chewed sandals

question: My sandals hurt. How do I break them in faster?
intents: My sandals are hurting my feet. What’s the fastest way to break them in?
These sandals feel tight and painful. How can I break them in faster?
My sandals are causing discomfort. How can I make them more comfortable quickly?
My new sandals hurt when I walk. How can I break them in sooner?
answer: Thank you for reaching out to us, I am sorry to hear about the trouble you are experiencing with our sandals. One thing to mention is the strap on the sandal will be tight at first, as the sandals do have an initial break in period. During this time, you will want to start of wearing them for 5-10 minutes at a time, until the materials in the straps and the foam in the foot bed conform to your feet. Other tricks you can use to help beak them in faster are, wedging a water bottle under the straps overnight. This will help stretch the straps and alleviate some of the pressure between your toes. Also, customers have reported wearing an old pair of socks with their sandals helps them break in. Please give those suggestions a try before giving up on them. Once they break in, they become very comfortable. Please let us know if you do have any other questions or concerns.

question: I’m having trouble placing an order on the website. Can you help?
intents: I’m experiencing issues when trying to order online. Can you help?
There’s a problem with placing my order online. Can you help resolve it?
I’m not able to submit my order. Can you help?
I’m running into an issue while ordering on the site. Can you help me fix it? 🛒
answer:
Thank you for reaching out to us, I apologize for any trouble with getting an order placed on the website. We use USPS to validate the address information, after you enter you zip code a pop up will typically appear allowing you to confirm the address. If that is not happening we can place the order manually for you. For us to do this we will need the following information emailed back to us:

Billing Name and Address
Ship to Name and Address
Item/s you wish to purchase
Phone number

*Method of payment

We can call you directly for payment information if you prefer
OR
If you provide your card information all we need is the Card Number and Expiration Date
Once we have your email response with the requested information, we can move forward with calling you for payment information. If you provide your payment information in the email, we will move forward with placing the order. Another option is we do sell our sandals officially through Amazon if that is an easier route. I hope this information is helpful, and we look forward to getting your email response and assisting with placing the order manually.

question: Do you ship internationally? How do I place an international order?
intents: Do you deliver to other countries? How do I make an international purchase?
How do I place an order if I’m located outside the country?
Can customers order from abroad, and how is it done? 🌍📦
answer:
Thank you for reaching out to us and for your interest in our brand. We can ship internationally to your country. To get this process started we need a few things:

- Your full billing and Shipping name and address (including postal/ zip code)
- The Exact Items you would like to order (color, size, and style)
- Phone Number

After you provide us these things, we can generate a shipping quote for you. From that point, if you agree to the shipping cost we can arrange for payment and process the order for you. Another thing to mention is we do sell our sandals officially through Amazon, which may provide better shipping options to your location. I look forward to your response, but please let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.

question: How do I complete an exchange?
intents: What steps are needed to finish an exchange?
How do I return an item for an exchange?
answer:
There are two options:
We can place the exchange order for you.
Please complete the return form with the exchange details (form is located at the link below)
Ship the item/s back to us at your expense
We charge \$7 for shipping the exchange item back to you (please include a check or money order, otherwise with your permission we can charge the card on file)
You can place a new order online and send your package back to us for refund.
Please complete the return form with the refund details (form is located at the link below)
Ship the item/s back to us at your expense
It can take up to 2-3 business days for the refund to show up on your card once we process the refund

Our address is:
Rainbow Sandals  
900 Calle Negocio   
San Clemente, CA 92673

Please keep in mind the sandals must be in like new condition. They cannot have a visible footprint, dirt, or blemishes on them, or they will not be accepted back for return or exchange.

Please let us know if you have any other questions.

Here is the link to the return form: https://www.rainbowsandals.com/customer-service/return-exchange

question: I received a defective or incorrect item. What should I do?
intents: My order arrived damaged or incorrect. What are the next steps?
I got the wrong item in my order. How can I fix this?
My order was delivered with a problem. What should I do?
The product I received isn’t what I ordered. What are my options?
I received a faulty item. How can I report it? 📦🔄
answer:
I’m very sorry we sent you a defective item. We can make this right for you. There are 2 options for you:
 
We can send you a FedEx return label; or you can ship them back to us at your cost and we can reimburse you for the shipping cost. I highly suggest you do the second option and mail them back to us and we can reimburse you. It will be significantly faster as if you request a FedEx label then we must request it from the warehouse. It usually takes them about a week to get us the label since they are so busy right now. Be sure to fill out the exchange form that was in the package or include a note with all your contact info and a description of exactly what we did wrong and what you should have received. At that point mail it back to us and we will get you the correct item back as soon as we can. We cannot mail out the correct item before we receive the other one back first.
 
Take care and sorry again!

question: My leather cracked. Can it be repaired under warranty?
answer:
Cracked leather

Thank you for sending us the photos, unfortunately, your sandals are no longer covered by our Rainbow warranty due to the Cracked Leather. Once this occurs in the sandals, we are no longer able to take them apart to repair any manufacturing defects. Cracked and worn-down leather is not considered a manufacturing defect but rather and wear and tear issue. Like any leather product our leather sandals run the risk of cracking. This is generally caused by the sandals collecting moisture from water or sweat and drying out repeatedly. I’m sorry about this. Let us know if you have any additional questions.

Warranty: https://www.rainbowsandals.com/customer-service/rainbow-guarantee

question: My strap tore. Why is this not covered under warranty?
answer:
Thank you for sending us the photos, unfortunately torn straps are not covered under our warranty. Our warranty covers manufacturing defects such as straps pulling out, stitching coming undone, layers of the sandals separating, leather bubbling, anything that would indicate the sandals were not constructed properly.  Wear and tear issues such as worn-down soles, torn straps, cracked leather, dog chew, etc. are not covered because they are caused by use which as a manufacture we have no control over.  Please let us know if you have additional questions.

Warranty: https://www.rainbowsandals.com/customer-service/rainbow-guarantee

question: I wore through the heel or sole. Can it be replaced under warranty?
answer:
Thank you for sending us your photos, unfortunately due to the worn-out heels, your sandals are no longer covered under our warranty. Our warranty covers manufacturing defects such as straps pulling out, stitching coming undone, layers of the sandals separating, leather bubbling, anything that would indicate the sandals were not constructed properly. We cover the sandals until you have worn through either the top or bottom layer of the sandal.  When you do wear through either the top or bottom layer of the sandal that voids the warranty and we will no longer cover them against any defect. The company’s position is that once you have worn through the layers you have got sufficient use of the sandal. Please let us know if you have any questions.

Warranty: https://www.rainbowsandals.com/customer-service/rainbow-guarantee

question: Why aren’t my worn out sandals covered under warranty?
answer:
Worn out soles, how determined: 

I’ll do my best to clarify why your sandals were not covered. We didn’t past warranty the pair due to just wear and tear. We understand that sandals are going to come back in worn condition and we encourage people to be active with our product.
The issue with your sandals was that you actually wore through the soles. Our warranty covers the sandals against manufacturing defects until you wear through the top or bottom soles. 

Rainbow Sandals feels this was a better solution than putting a 6-12-18 month, etc.  Time frame on the warranty. Hence the term “lifetime of the soles.”

Warranty: https://www.rainbowsandals.com/customer-service/rainbow-guarantee 

*** When we checked the Ship to address through the Postal Service the address provided did not come up as valid. Please double check your entry to ensure it is correct. If it is correct we can move forward with placing the order, but we cannot guarantee delivery. ***
